div.class: boq_dash_header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between px-4 py-3 border-bottom

div.small: Vendor-wise RFQ summary, margins and project status

div.div:
POs Fully Paid
with outstanding invoices

div.class: boq_vendor_totals_bar px-4 pb-3 d-flex flex-wrap gap-3 align-items-center

div.t:
No RFQs linked to BOQs yet.
Open a BOQ, assign vendors to lines, and click Create RFQ.

div.class: card-header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between p-0 ps-3
d-flex align-items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 bg-light border-bottom flex-wrap

t.p: No BOQ lines found for this vendor.

div.class: boq_pay_overview border rounded p-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-4
border rounded p-3 d-flex align-items-center gap-3 flex-wrap

t.p: Rating is based on completed purchase orders where receipts are confirmed.
No rating yet. Rate the vendor on the purchase order form after all goods receipts are confirmed.
